summary: Improved sidebar collapse behavior, settings dialog scrolling, and release output naming.
highlights: Added a left toolbar rail when the sidebar is collapsed, including shorthand log-level toggles.
Moved sidebar collapse/expand chevrons to a dedicated bottom row so they remain visible outside scrolling content.
Made active collapsed rail toggles easier to read with a clearer accent-green border.
Adjusted Application Settings window sizing and scroll padding so full content is reachable at the bottom.
Set publish output naming to SamLabs.Beobachter.exe by setting the application assembly name.
Fixed LogStream view row-font bindings to avoid design-time cast errors with LogStreamDesignViewModel.
